name: Ghost Twin & Spring Rabbit
desc: When a monster on the field activates its effect, or when a Spell/Trap that is already face-up on the field activates its effect (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; destroy that card on field, then you can discard 1 card from your hand, banish that destroyed card and all card with the same name from both player Deck/ Extra Deck. You can only use this effect of "Ghost Twin & Spring Rabbit" once per turn.
strings: Discard this card to destroy opponent's card
Discard 1 card to banish all copies?
